message:
feat(core): add replay_capture adapter + resolve beads merge conflict

Replay capture adapter:
Introduces a CaptureAdapter that converts CapturedSegment egress events
and lifecycle/control markers into fully populated RecorderEvent records
with deterministic event IDs and merge keys assigned at capture time.

Architecture: ingest.rs -> CapturedSegment -> CaptureAdapter -> RecorderEvent
The adapter is an observer (tap) that does not modify the upstream pipeline
and is zero-cost when no sink is attached.

- New module: replay_capture (1242 LOC) with CaptureAdapter, CaptureConfig,
  CaptureStats, sink trait, and comprehensive inline tests
- Add Default derive to RecorderEventCausality in recording.rs (needed by adapter)
- Register replay_capture module in lib.rs

Beads sync:
- Resolve merge conflict in .beads/issues.jsonl (both-modified during
  concurrent agent work; working copy already contained the merged result
  with all issues from both sides, validated as clean JSONL)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
